backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (UserProfile, UserSettings, Experience) and query/update methods for experiences, user profiles, and language settings, with authorization and blob storage mixins included.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the application root in App.tsx is wrapped with TranslationProvider so all components can access translation context without errors.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key details of every component, page, hook, and style file.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Dini.Verse app, setting up the root div, favicon, viewport meta, and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes and wraps the router in ThemeProvider, TranslationProvider, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/auth/AccountsDis: Card component that prompts unauthenticated users to log in or sign up, with navigation buttons to the login and signup pages.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthButtons: Authentication button component that renders Log In/Sign Up buttons for unauthenticated users or a Log Out button for authenticated users, with a loading spinner state.
frontend/src/components/auth/RequireProf: Authentication guard component that shows a loading spinner while checking auth state, renders a login/signup prompt card for unauthenticated users, and renders children for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/create/builder2d: Renders the 2D builder canvas with interactive drag-and-drop and corner-handle resizing for placed elements, updating element positions and dimensions via the builder hook.
Provides a file input button that reads a user-selected image file and adds it as a decal to the 2D builder canvas.
Displays controls for the selected builder element to bring it forward, send it backward, or delete it from the canvas.
Shows a properties panel with sliders and color inputs for editing the selected element's position, opacity, rotation, color, and dimensions.
Manages saving, loading, exporting, importing, and deleting named canvas prop configurations using the useBuilder2DProps hook, with dialogs for export/import data.
Renders buttons to add rectangle, circle, or triangle shapes to the 2D builder canvas.
frontend/src/components/experiences/Crea: Renders a follow/unfollow button for a creator's principal, toggling follow state via social following hooks and hiding itself for unauthenticated users or the current user.
frontend/src/components/experiences/Expe: Displays a card for a single experience with its thumbnail, title, description, and creator name, navigating to the experience detail page on click.
Renders a responsive grid of ExperienceCard components with skeleton loading placeholders and an empty-state message.
Provides thumbs-up and thumbs-down rating buttons for an experience, displaying current counts and submitting ratings via the useRateExperience hook.
frontend/src/components/experiences/InGa: A fixed in-game menu button that opens dialogs for leaving the game, resetting the character (with confirmation), and accessing a placeholder settings panel.
frontend/src/components/experiences/Publ: A dialog form for publishing a new experience, collecting title, description, category, gameplay controls, and an optional thumbnail, then submitting via the createExperience mutation.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Root layout component that composes the site header, left sidebar, main content outlet, and site footer into a full-page flex layout.
frontend/src/components/layout/AuthChang: A static informational banner alerting users that on-platform authentication is now available and that external login redirects remain disabled.
frontend/src/components/layout/LeftSideb: A responsive left navigation sidebar with links to Profile, Social, Inventory, Groups, and Settings, using translated labels and active-link highlighting.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteFoote: A simple site footer displaying the copyright year and a 'Built with caffeine.ai' attribution link.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteHeade: A sticky top header with the site logo, main navigation links, auth buttons, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/profile/ProfileH: Displays a user's profile card with their avatar, display name, and quick-action buttons to Discover or Publish an Experience.
frontend/src/components/social/Following: A panel listing all creators the current user follows, with the ability to unfollow each one, fetching creator profiles by principal.
frontend/src/components/social/FriendsPa: React component that provides a friends management UI, including searching for users, sending/accepting/declining friend requests, and unfriending, with loading skeletons and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/social/MessagesP: React component that renders a two-panel messaging UI allowing users to search for other users, select a conversation recipient, and send/view messages.
frontend/src/components/social/PartiesPa: Placeholder React component displaying a 'Party System Coming Soon' card with no functional implementation yet.
frontend/src/contexts/TranslationContext: React context provider that supplies a translation function `t` based on the user's language setting, with a fallback to English when keys are missing.
frontend/src/hooks/useAccountSettings.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for reading and mutating user account settings (display name, avatar, visibility, language, gender, etc.) via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBuilder2D.ts: Hook managing state for a 2D canvas builder, supporting adding, selecting, updating, deleting, reordering, and clearing shape/decal elements.
frontend/src/hooks/useBuilder2DProps.ts: Hook for persisting and managing saved 2D builder prop configurations in localStorage, with save, delete, export, and import operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUser.ts: Thin wrapper hook that exposes the current user, authentication status, and loading state from `useSessionAuth`.
frontend/src/hooks/useExperiences.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, searching, filtering, creating, and rating experiences via the backend actor, with several mutations stubbed out as not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Consolidates React Query hooks for user profiles and experiences (fetch, search, create, rate) into a single file, with several mutations stubbed as not yet implemented in the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useSessionAuth.ts: Manages session-token-based authentication state (login, signup, logout) with placeholder backend calls replaced by mock token generation until the backend implements session auth.
frontend/src/hooks/useSocialFollowing.ts: Provides placeholder React Query hooks for a creator-following system (follow, unfollow, follower count, is-following), all disabled or throwing errors since the backend is not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useSocialFriends.ts: Provides React Query hooks for a friends system (list friends, pending requests, send/respond/unfriend), with all mutations stubbed as not yet implemented in the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useSocialMessages.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and sending direct messages between principals, with the backend methods stubbed as not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useSocialParties.ts: Provides a single placeholder React Query hook for fetching the current party, disabled and returning null until the backend party system is implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useTranslation.ts: Re-exports the translation context hook from TranslationContext as a convenience useTranslation hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserDiscovery.ts: Provides a disabled React Query hook for searching users by term, returning an empty array until the backend implements session-based user search.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles (current user, by principal, and sign-up), all currently disabled/stubbed pending backend session auth implementation.
frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts: Exports a translations object containing English UI strings organized by feature area (nav, auth, home, discover, profile, social, settings, etc.).
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports the Outfit font, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AvatarShop.tsx: Placeholder page for the Avatar Shop displaying category cards (Clothing, Accessories, Premium, Animations) with a 'Coming Soon' message and disabled browse button.
frontend/src/pages/Create.tsx: Landing page for the Create section that presents two navigation cards: one for the 2D Games Builder and one for the UGC Accessories creator.
Full-page 2D game builder editor layout composing ShapePalette, DecalUploader, LayerControls, BuilderCanvas, PropertiesPanel, and PropsPanel components driven by the useBuilder2D hook.
Placeholder page for the UGC Accessories Creator showing a 'Coming Soon' message with a back-navigation button to the Create landing page.
frontend/src/pages/DiniBucks.tsx: Page displaying the Dini Bucks virtual currency system, showing the user's balance (if authenticated) and informational cards about earning, spending, trading, and premium access.
frontend/src/pages/Discover.tsx: Page for browsing and searching experiences, with tabs for trending categories and an option for authenticated users to publish new experiences.
frontend/src/pages/ExperienceDetails.tsx: Detail page for a single experience showing its thumbnail, creator info, rating controls, and a play button that launches an in-game view for authenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/Groups.tsx: Placeholder page for the Groups feature, displaying an empty state card prompting users to join groups.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page showing a personalized welcome card for authenticated users, a grid of recommended experiences, and a friend activity sidebar.
frontend/src/pages/Inventory.tsx: Placeholder page for the user's inventory, displaying an empty state card directing users to the Avatar Shop.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page with a username/password form that calls the session auth hook and redirects to home on success.
frontend/src/pages/Profile.tsx: Displays the authenticated user's profile page with avatar, display name, username, and buttons to edit profile or navigate to settings. Wrapped in RequireProfile to enforce authentication.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Full account settings page allowing users to update display name, avatar, visibility, gender, language, and theme, with options to delete their account. Uses multiple mutation hooks and syncs form state with fetched settings.
frontend/src/pages/SignUp.tsx: Sign-up form page that collects username, display name, password, and confirmation, validates inputs, and calls the signup hook before redirecting to home.
frontend/src/pages/Social.tsx: Social hub page with tabbed navigation for Friends, Messages, Parties, and Following panels; redirects unauthenticated users to an accounts-disabled notice.
frontend/src/utils/formatError.ts: Utility function that normalizes any thrown value (Error objects, strings, plain objects, backend trap errors) into a human-readable English string.
frontend/src/utils/sessionToken.ts: Provides get, set, and clear helpers for persisting a session token string in localStorage under a fixed key.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, with helpers to persist values in sessionStorage and remove sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, content paths, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, typography/container-queries/animate plugins, and accordion keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Tracks project state for a fix request addressing a missing TranslationProvider context error, with one existing feature and one pending action request to wrap the app root in TranslationProvider.
